emails.body: Re: Lacima Energy and Weather Derivatives Courses by Clewlow and Strickland Sure: I think that would be a great opportunity to get more insights on modeling forward curves. I would like to participate on both courses if possible. Many thanks for remembering my name. Paulo Issler. Vince J Kaminski 11/13/2000 08:15 AM
